allow: Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\(''mysql2/promise''\); \(async \(\) => { try { const c = await mysql.createConnection\({ host: ''awh-plesk1-win2019.adaptivewebhosting.com'', user: ''groups_club_admin'', password: ''%%#pmu5Pt4yvDjR8k'', database: ''thatpaolo_groups_club'' }\); const [rows] = await c.query\(''SELECT 1 as test''\); console.log\(''Connected!'', rows\); await c.end\(\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(e.message\); } }\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\(''mysql2/promise''\); \(async \(\) => { try { const c = await mysql.createConnection\({ host: ''awh-plesk1-win2019.adaptivewebhosting.com'', port: 3306, user: ''groups_club_admin'', password: ''%#pmu5Pt4yvDjR8k'', database: ''thatpaolo_groups_club'' }\); const [rows] = await c.query\(''SELECT 1 as test''\); console.log\(''Connected OK:'', rows\); const [grants] = await c.query\(''SHOW GRANTS''\); console.log\(''Grants:'', JSON.stringify\(grants\)\); await c.end\(\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(''Error:'', e.code, e.message\); } }\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\(''mysql2/promise''\); \(async \(\) => { try { const c = await mysql.createConnection\({ host: ''awh-plesk1-win2019.adaptivewebhosting.com'', port: 3306, user: ''groups_club_admin'', password: ''%#pmu5Pt4yvDjR8k'' }\); const [grants] = await c.query\(''SHOW GRANTS''\); console.log\(''Grants:''\); grants.forEach\(g => console.log\(Object.values\(g\)[0]\)\); const [dbs] = await c.query\(''SHOW DATABASES''\); console.log\(''Databases:'', dbs.map\(d => d.Database\)\); await c.end\(\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(''Error:'', e.code, e.message\); } }\)\(\)")
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" repo create groups-club --public --source=. --remote=origin --description "Group management web app - Facebook Groups replacement")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v1: Full groups.club application

Express + TypeScript backend with Prisma ORM, Bootstrap 5 + Navigo SPA frontend.
Features: auth \(local + Google OAuth\), groups CRUD, memberships with roles,
threaded discussions with nested comments, Markdown support, user profiles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(set "PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION=yes, it''s a dev database, go ahead")
Bash(cmd /c "set PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION=yes, it''s a dev database, go ahead && npx prisma db push --force-reset")
Bash(cross-env "PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION=yes, it''s a dev database, go ahead" npx prisma db push --force-reset)
Bash(PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION="yes, it''s a dev database, go ahead" npx prisma db push:*)
